ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "budget_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the budget */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the budget */,
  "fund_code" INTEGER /* Unique fund code for the budget entry */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Expense, Revenue) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated or spent */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the budget entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the budget entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the budget entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_fund_code FOREIGN KEY ("fund_code") REFERENCES funds ("fund_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_account_type FOREIGN KEY ("account_type") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund code */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Description of the fund purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fund was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fund */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the fund is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., Expense, Revenue) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment record */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being amended */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the amendment */,
  "new_amount" REAL /* New amount after the amendment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the amendment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the amendment */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_amendments_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_amendments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, finance staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this detail belongs to */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item associated with the report */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount related to the budget item in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "auditor" TEXT /* Name of the auditor conducting the audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings and notes from the audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the audit log */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_auditor FOREIGN KEY ("auditor") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "budget_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the forecast */,
  "forecast_amount" REAL /* Forecast amount for the budget */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forecast */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the forecast */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_forecasts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_variances" (
  "variance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variance entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item for comparison */,
  "actual_amount" REAL /* Actual amount spent */,
  "variance_amount" REAL /* Calculated variance amount (budgeted - actual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the variance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the variance */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the variance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_variances_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_variances_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
